name: personal-stack-health
label: Stack Health
description: One-glance health check for personal long-running services. Monitors: ComfyUI_Ideogram (port 8194), n8n (port 5678), OpenClaw gateway (port 18789), Prayer pipeline v3 (port 5000), Hermes gateway (port 9119). 30s polling, 10s timeout, status + RSS + uptime. Plain React IIFE, no build step.
